title: LLOYTRON MIP System 3rd Gen Doorbell Kits with Battery Operated Chime Receiver and Bell Push - Ding Dong Melody – Portable with 175m Wireless Range True Sound – Easy Set-up B7030WH – White
features: The 3rd generation in mip system Technology allows you to choose different sounds for different bell pushes and other transmitters with the flick of a switch so you can identify which door or room has been activated
Compatible with previous mip system generations.
High quality true ding dong sounds custom-made for the UK market
description: From the manufacturer More than just a Doorbell The MIP System is more than just a doorbell; with the ability to purchase and link up additional MIP System products you can mix and match to create the perfect wireless alert system for your home or business. Select a different tune for each door - with the new generation of MIP System doorbells you can select up to 4 different tunes from different bell pushes or sensors. How is the MIP System different to a traditional doorbell? The MIP System can expand well beyond a basic doorbell with the ability to wirelessly link up to 16 different products together at one time. Don’t forget, all MIP System products link wirelessly, so there are no unattractive wires and no damage to walls to install; simply link up and go. Starting your MIP system It’s simple to get started, just purchase at least one Transmitter and one Receiver, link up and you’ve started your MIP System. MIP System uses stretch beyond the home, it's an ideal solution for retail, receptions, offices, warehousing and caring for the infirm - creating an alert system and added security. Bell Push Transmitter PIR Motion Sensor Transmitter Magnetic Sensor Transmitter Wired to Wireless Module Chime Receiver (Portable or Plug-in) Add To Basket Buying Options Add To Basket Buying Options Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.3 out of 5 stars 726 4.3 out of 5 stars 726 4.3 out of 5 stars 726 4.3 out of 5 stars 726 4.3 out of 5 stars 726 Price £9.96 £ 9 . 96 — no data £7.99 £ 7 . 99 — no data £14.47 £ 14 . 47 Build Your MIP System Add an additional bell push to the back door or out building. Add a motion sensor to your garage or driveway to detect movement at your property. Add a magnetic sensor to your shed door or front door to be alerted when the door is opened for added security. Make a wired bell system wireless or use with an original ornate bell push. Add a portable receiver for when you’re on the move/in the garden or plug-in receivers for different areas of your home. Unobstructed Wireless Range 200m 175m 200m 200m 200m Build the perfect alert system for your home
